body.title: Ticket schema: add decision_id + gate fields
body.result: cc_queue.py: added decision_id + gate default-null keys on add; list filters gated by default, --gated / --by-decision flags; verbs gate/ungate/set-decision. d93c71e4.
body.description:
Two additive fields on every ticket:

- `decision_id` (string or null): parent /decided decision that spawned this ticket. Enables two-way navigation (ticket → decision + decision → spawned_tickets).
- `gate` (string or null): 'come back to' precondition, e.g. 'after productization'. Default queue selectors (cc_queue.py list, /sprint next) filter out gated tickets. Decision rollup un-gates when its milestone closes.

## Changes
- Update cc_queue.py:
  - Accept both new fields on add
  - `list` filters out `gate != null` by default; `--gated` shows them
  - New verb: `ungate <id>` sets gate=null with audit note
  - New verb: `gate <id> <reason>`
- Optionally: a migration pass over existing queue.json to add null fields (additive, safe).

## Not in scope
- Decision rollup (un-gating on milestone close) — separate ticket.
- /review enforcement — separate ticket.
